title: MarketSnapshot
description: Point-in-time cross-asset market data produced by the FORTIFYOS Macro Intel Engine for a single session checkpoint.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset (America/New_York) at the moment this snapshot was built.

assets.description: Ordered array of AssetSnapshot objects. One entry per tracked asset.

AssetSnapshot.description: Price and delta data for a single tracked asset at this checkpoint.

value.description: Current numeric value. Null when data is unavailable.

changeSinceLast.description: Absolute change from the prior engine run's snapshot. Null when no prior run exists.

pctSinceLast.description: Percentage change from the prior engine run's snapshot. Null when no prior run exists.

changeVsClose.description: Absolute change from the prior session close stored in macro.json. Null when unavailable.

pctVsClose.description: Percentage change from the prior session close. Null when unavailable.

impactTag.description: Qualitative impact classification based on pctVsClose thresholds.

meta.description: Additional raw fields from macro.json not mapped to top-level fields.
